shared_properties: 120x180 frame size and champion body proportions.
High collar, cape panel layout, and staff focus silhouette.
Leftward facing stance on the upper-right duel anchor.
differences: Staff swings forward by about 36 px toward the spell lane.
Free hand opens and emits a bright forecast ring near the wrist.
Cape panels flare outward to frame the launch motion.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the cast state and trigger the projectile spawn on the authored launch frame.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/enemy_champion_cast_6f_12fps.png through AssetServer and cache the atlas under enemy_champion_cast_6f_12fps.
runtime_notes: Projectile spawn timing aligns to frame 3.
Forecast icon placement uses the same head anchor as the idle state.
The cast animation returns to idle when the sixth frame completes if no chained spell follows.

context.usage: Shown during the 0.5 second telegraph and the first launch beat for each hostile projectile.

shape.silhouette: Expanded enemy silhouette with a forward staff line and a glowing casting ring.

appendages.accessories: Staff focus, cape clasp, shoulder sigil, and casting ring.

specs.texture: Gemstone glow intensifies at the staff head and cape lining catches cool light during the cast.
specs.shading: Soft gradient shading with brighter cyan edge light around the casting hand.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 720x180 px with six 120x180 frames.
Forward staff motion keeps the tip inside the frame while clearly pointing into the spell lane.
Casting ring remains readable above the wrist without merging into the cape outline.
